markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.206 — Violation

A violation by a judicial officer of this subchapter may constitute misconduct in office and may be grounds for removal from the officer’s position.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A violation by a judicial officer of this subchapter may constitute misconduct in office and may be grounds for removal from the officer’s position.
